channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][STAFF][开播] Anime News Network 动画 Expo Screens U.S. 开播 Sparks Tomorrow TV 动画, Hosts Frieren: Beyond Journey的 End 动画 制作阵容
item.description: Tomoya Kitagawa, Keiichiro Saito, Yuichiro Fukushi, Keisuke Kojima attend July 2-5 convention ― Anime Expo announced on Tuesday that it will screen the U.S. premiere of the first two episodes of the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Anime Expo Screens U.S. Premiere of Sparks of Tomorrow TV Anime, Hosts Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Anime Staff

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network SkySet Entertainment Stream, Produce English Dub Go Forward 动画 Series
item.description: 2003 anime, 2004 sequel to stream in late summer 2026 ― Licensing and dubbing studio SkySet Entertainment announced on Thursday it will stream the Go Forward (Massugu ni Ikō) television anime and the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: SkySet Entertainment to Stream, Produce English Dub for Go Forward Anime Series

item.title: [CAST][STAFF][发表] MyAnimeList Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori 宣布 追加 声优阵容, 制作阵容
item.description: The official website of the Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori (Red River) television anime revealed additional cast, staff, and a key visual (pictured right) on Thursday.
